description: We will gather in person and remotely for our very first OM chanting circle!  Join us and be part of the innagural circle and help us get accepted to the Google App store!  To attend, we request that you register as a beta tester so we can fulfill Googles app store requirement (we need 12 registered beta testers with google accounts and ideally android phones).  First, log into your google account, then follow the event link and register as a beta tester.  On the day of the event, use that link to join the room.  If you cannot register, you can still attend the event by joining the OM chanting room at the specified time
